About Precision Pavement Maintenance LLC

12+ years serving Oklahoma City and surrounding areas

Precision Pavement Maintenance LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Oklahoma City homeowners with durable, beautiful driveways that stand the test of time. Frustrated by seeing shoddy paving work crumble under Oklahoma's harsh climate, we decided to bring a higher standard to the industry.

Our approach is straightforward: quality materials, expert craftsmanship, and unwavering attention to detail. We understand the nuances of Oklahoma City's soil and weather patterns, and we build our driveways to withstand it all, from scorching summers to icy winters. We don't cut corners, and we stand behind our work.

We're not just paving driveways; we're building relationships within the Oklahoma City community. We believe in honest communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. When you choose Precision Pavement Maintenance, you're choosing a partner who cares about your property and your satisfaction.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Precision Pavement Maintenance LLC

Trusted driveway paving professionals serving Oklahoma City, OK and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
